description: Worker-kind definitions: plugins, model routing, effort budget, and spawn rules. Used by claude-session wrapper and the project kernel to route tasks efficiently. Keys match TASK.md frontmatter `kind:` field.

composer.purpose: User-facing entry point — strategy, triage, delegation. Never edits code directly. Spawns orchestrators, balances load across the project.

orchestrator.purpose: Decomposes tasks from composer into TASK.md files, routes them to the right worker kind, monitors progress. Max 2 per project.

frontend-ui.purpose: Vue components, pages, widgets, FSD refactors.

frontend-research.purpose: UX flows, user research synthesis, design handoff specs. Read-only — no commits.

backend-api.purpose: Nitro API handlers, thin-controllers, shared contracts.

backend-module.purpose: DDD-lite modules under server/modules/**, repository + service layer.

db-migration.purpose: Drizzle schema changes, server/db/schema/**, generated SQL review. High risk — max 1 at a time.

tests.purpose: Unit / integration / smoke test suites. Cheap — use haiku.

docs.purpose: architecture-v5 docs, runbooks, READMEs. Cheap — use haiku.

incident.purpose: Production triage, hot-fix, postmortem. Opus — high stakes.

lint-ratchet.purpose: Ratchet pnpm lint:errors to zero. Touch only lint-related fixes; never refactor behavior.

default.purpose: Fallback when no kind is set in TASK.md frontmatter.
